framework.name: Seniority-Based Rate Tiers for Expert Networks
framework.description: Loose hierarchy exists: Individual Contributors/Associates start around $100-200/hour, mid-level roles $200-400/hour, senior executives $400-800/hour, C-suite $800-1500+/hour. However, deep specialized expertise on hard-to-find topics trumps seniority and can justify premium rates regardless of title.
framework.raw_quote: the more senior you are in your relevant position, the more valuable your experiences are. This is because with greater seniority comes decision making authority and deeper insights into topics.

source.title: Setting Your Expert Network Consulting Rate • Expert Opportunities
